sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see the issue! The green blocks are at rows 31-35, not rows 25-30. My previous clicks at row 25 missed them entirely. That's why no greens were collected and the bar only went up by 1 (one click accidentally hit something else).
There are only 7 green blocks remaining (not 14), which means 7 were already collected in a previous game session before the game over reset. But the current state shows 7 greens at rows 31-35.
Wait - looking more carefully, there are 7 green blocks in a single row at rows 31-35. Previously I thought there were 2 rows of 7. Let me check the image again... The image shows what looks like a single row of 7 green blocks.
So the correct row to click is around row 33 (middle of 31-35). Let me try clicking the greens at the correct position.
But I also need to remember: game over happens after 8-9 green clicks. With only 7 greens remaining, I should be able to collect all 7 without hitting game over!
Let me click all 7 greens at the correct row.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Greens are at rows 31-35, cols 13-53 (7 blocks, each 5 wide with 1 gap)
# Only 7 greens left - can collect all without game over (limit is 8-9)!
# Click center of each green block (row 33, center cols)

action([
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 15},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 21},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 27},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 33},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 39},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 45},
    {'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 33, 'col': 51}
])
</parameter>
<parameter=world_model>

Dots: adds to bar.", "RIGHT": "Moves player right ~6 columns"}, "cross_level_notes": "Green blocks at rows 31-35, not 25-30. Only 7 remain.", "hud_map": {"bottom_bar": "64-wide bar at row 63"}, "level_log": {"level2": "Found correct green block row (31-35). 7 remain, under game over limit."}, "win_pattern": {"level1": "Collect green blocks, move LEFT toward pink cross"}}, "level_tier": {"current_plan": "Collect all 7 remaining greens at rows 31-35, then LEFT to complete", "failed_probes": ["Row 25 clicks missed greens"], "goal_model": "Collect all greens then LEFT to complete", "recent_findings": ["Greens at rows 31-35, only 7 remain - under game over limit"], "world_model": "7 green blocks at rows 31-35, cols 13-53"}}
